transactions.description: Baltimore Orioles placed RHP Dean Kremer on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 20, 2026. Right quad strain.
Atlanta Braves selected the contract of RHP JR Ritchie from Gwinnett Stripers.
Philadelphia Phillies transferred RHP Max Lazar from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list. Left oblique strain.
New York Yankees recalled RHP Jake Bird from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
Philadelphia Phillies selected the contract of C Garrett Stubbs from Lehigh Valley IronPigs.
Toledo Mud Hens activated RHP Scott Effross from the 7-day injured list.
